label: Learning About Island Threats
description: Characters discover information about dangers threatening Stormwreck Isle while at the cloister

label: Player Character Introduction
description: DM encourages players to introduce their characters and discuss reasons for visiting Dragon's Rest

label: Marching Order Discussion
description: DM requests players to establish their marching order as they prepare to approach the cloister

label: Environmental Inquiry Resolution
description: Players consult map 2 and "Dragon's Rest Locations" to understand the cloister's visible features from the boat

label: Exploration Toward Cloister
description: Party begins movement toward the cloister while organizing their formation

label: Approach to Dragon's Rest
description: Adventurers sail toward the island, noting vibrant seaweed and illuminated landscapes

label: Anchor Drop at Harbor
description: Ship anchors at the harbor entrance while observing cliffs and rocky formations

label: Shore Leave by Sailors
description: Sailors transport adventurers to the dock where they bid farewell

label: Statue Inspection
description: Adventurers examine the central statue featuring a wizened man and songbirds

label: Path Discovery
description: Identification of the stone-paved trail ascending the cliffside to the temple

label: Directional Guidance
description: Sailors point toward the path and offer wishes for safe travels

label: Initial_Zombie_Encounter
description: The party faces three shambling zombies originating from a shipwreck, presented with the choice to fight or continue along the upward path.

label: Combat_Initiated
description: Upon deciding to engage, the zombies begin moving toward the party, initiating a combat sequence with initiative checks and melee attacks.

label: Strategic_Movement_Decision
description: The party chooses to bypass the zombies by advancing along the upward path, avoiding direct conflict.

label: Hearing Ruckus
description: Characters hear splashing and a wet, gurgling moan behind them

label: Encounter with Drowned Sailors
description: Three figures shambling up from the water's edge wearing sailor attire, with gray skin and seawater dripping from their mouths

label: Observing Drowned Figures
description: Characters notice the figures' unnatural appearance, including gray skin, wet clothing, and predatory lurching motion toward them

label: Zombie Resists Death
description: A zombie's Undead Fortitude trait causes it to survive lethal damage, prompting the DM to inform players about the phenomenon

label: Radiant Damage Effect
description: A zombie reacts painfully to radiant damage (like sacred flame), allowing the DM to explain its vulnerability to radiant energy

label: Intelligence Check for Zombie Tactics
description: Players must make Intelligence checks to learn that critical hits or radiant damage bypasses Undead Fortitude

label: Combat_Between_Zombies_And_Adventurers
description: The zombies engage in combat with the adventurers

label: Adventurers_Wake_Up_In_Temple
description: The characters awaken in the temple after being rescued

label: Runara_Rescues_Adventurers
description: Runara arrives to rescue the adventurers from the zombies

label: Dialogue_With_Runara
description: Runara explains she heard combat sounds and arrived to prevent the zombies from dragging them into the sea

label: Observing_Combat_Sounds
description: Runara notices the sounds of combat leading her to intervene

label: Encountering_Zombies
description: Characters encounter zombies and choose not to fight, allowing easy escape.

label: Observing_Zombies_Not_Following
description: Characters observe that zombies do not follow them up the path toward Dragon's Rest.

label: Curious_Kobold_Questions
description: The kobolds repeatedly ask questions, prompting the characters to insist they stop.

label: Encounter_with_Elder_Runara
description: After silencing the kobolds, Elder Runara approaches to greet the characters.

label: Dialogue_about_Hospitality
description: Elder Runara acknowledges the characters’ service (if zombies were defeated) or invites them to stay at Dragon’s Rest, specifying accommodations in areas A1/A5 and shared meals in A3.

label: Offer_of_Gifts_Accepted
description: If characters propose paying or serving in exchange for lodging, Elder Runara accepts their offerings.

label: Access_to_Basic_Rules_Equipment
description: The characters learn they can purchase equipment from Myla, referencing resources in the Basic Rules.

label: Arriving_at_Cloister
description: The adventurer's arrival attracts the attention of the cloister's inhabitants, consisting primarily of kobolds and a couple of distant observers.

label: Dialogue_with_Kobolds
description: A curious kobold initiates conversation by asking the adventurer's name, prompting rapid questioning from the rest of the kobolds.

label: Kobolds Fall Silent
description: The chattering kobolds cease their noise as an elderly human woman descends from the cloister.

label: Welcome Dialogue
description: The elderly human woman extends her arms in greeting and addresses the adventurers with a welcome message referencing Bahamut's guidance.

label: Initial Encounters With Runara
description: Runara meets the characters with indifference, as stated in basic rules social interaction

label: Zombie Combat On Beach
description: Characters engage in battle against zombies threatening the cloister

label: Friendly Transition From Indifference
description: Runara becomes friendly after characters prove concern for cloister's safety through actions

label: Hostile Reaction To Resident Harm
description: Runara turns hostile if characters injure cloister residents, demanding reparations

label: Observation Of Hidden Residence
description: Residences note Runara's constant presence in public spaces while maintaining secrecy about her aquatic habitat

label: Inquiry About Living Arrangements
description: Characters ask about Runara's dwelling, prompting humorous denials from cloister inhabitants

label: Kitchen Incident Involving Laylee
description: An incident in the kitchen resulted in Laylee being prohibited from handling Myla's alchemical fire.

label: Initial_Dialogue_with_Tarak
description: Characters interact with Tarak, who is initially friendly but becomes hostile if questioned about his past

label: Exploration_of_Sea_Caves
description: Tarak ventures to the sea caves to harvest heart cap mushrooms from myconids

label: Observation_of_Fungal_Octopus_Guardian
description: Tarak notices a fearsome fungus-covered octopus monster guarding the myconid caves

label: Recognition_of_Gilded_Gallows_Symbol
description: A successful Intelligence (History) check identifies the gold hangman's noose tattoo as a symbol of the Gilded Gallows

label: Past_Poisoner_Discovered
description: Characters learn of Tarak's former role as a ruthless poisoner for the Gilded Gallows

label: Observing Ship Crash
description: Varnoth witnesses a ship altering its course and crashing into northern rocks during her temple maintenance duties

label: Historical Information Discovery
description: Learning Varnoth's name and succeeding on a History check reveals information about her past as General Varnoth Wender and the Azure Wolves

label: Attitude Shift Through Dialogue
description: Engaging Varnoth in conversations about history, ethics, and global impacts shifts her disposition from indifferent to friendly

label: Temple Maintenance Activity
description: Varnoth regularly performs repairs and upkeep tasks at the temple using her mason's tools

label: Observation of Garden Plots
description: Small, well-maintained garden areas containing flowers, herbs, and vegetables are noticed along the path.

label: Discovery of Plaza Structure
description: A widened plaza located approximately thirty feet above the bay is identified, featuring architectural elements like doorways.

label: Observation of Statue
description: A serene stone statue depicting a dragon is noted midway along the plaza.

label: Identification of Doorways
description: Six open doorways carved into the cliff face are detected during examination.

label: Observes Bronze Dragon Depiction
description: A character successfully identifies the dragon statue as depicting a bronze dragon after examining it

label: Dialog About Statue Identity
description: Characters question Runara about the statue; she reveals it portrays Astalagan, who died on the cliffs centuries ago, but keeps secret that Astalagan was her father

label: Exploring_Cloisters_Cells
description: Characters investigate the monastic cells within the cloister, examining their layouts and contents.

label: Discovered_Vacant_Cell
description: Characters learn the westernmost cell is unoccupied and potentially usable.

label: Observed_Mylas_Cluttered_Cell
description: Characters notice Myla's cell is disorganized, containing scattered junk and tools.

label: Noticed_Hammock_Equipped_Cells
description: Characters observe the fifth and sixth cells feature hammocks designated for the kobold inhabitants.

label: Observing Favorite Cooking Days
description: The cloister residents express quiet fondness for the days when Tarak cooks, although they never verbalize it

label: Dialogue_Between_Tarak_And_Varnoth
description: Tarak and Varnoth read and discuss various works in the library.

label: Observation_Of_Myla_Studious_Nature
description: Myla is described as studious.

label: Discovering_the_Library
description: Adventurers discover a spacious library behind an oak door with iron bands

label: Exploring_the_Room
description: Adventurers explore the library, noting bookshelves lining every wall

label: Observing_Specific_Features
description: Adventurers notice three free-standing shelves in the western half, a central table with two benches, writing implements, book stands, and glass-shielded lamps in the eastern half

label: Recognizing Bahamut
description: Character successfully identifies Bahamut after examining the statue with a Religion check

label: Detect Magic Revelation
description: Casting detect magic reveals a faint aura around the statue

label: Magical Protection Activation
description: Non-evil creatures gain bonus dice on saving throws due to protective magic

label: Offering Maintenance
description: Runara and assistants tend to the temple's incense offerings and maintain its upkeep

label: Historical Awareness
description: Runara recognizes the lingering magical effect from her late father Astalagan's death

label: Observing_Serenity
description: A feeling of serenity pervades the temple

label: Initial_Conversation_with_Residents
description: Characters engage in discussions with Dragon's Rest residents about the cloister's challenges

label: Exploration_of_Dragons_Rest
description: Party investigates Dragon's Rest area

label: Introduction_to_Seagrow_Caves_Adventure
description: Residences reveal potential adventures in the sea caves

label: Introduction_to_Compass_Rose_Wreck
description: Discussions hint at the shipwreck adventure

label: Journey_to_Clifftop_Observatory
description: Final destination after completing cave and wreck expeditions

label: Confrontation_with_Sparkrender
description: Climactic showdown against Sparkrender in the observatory

label: Character_Goal_Interaction
description: Personal objectives influence interactions with Runara and other inhabitants

label: Hearing Cries For Help
description: Adventurers hear cries for help while staying at the cloister

label: Second Zombie Encounter
description: Adventurers confront three zombies threatening Blepp and Tarak

label: Dialogue With Runara
description: Characters discuss zombies with Runara who reveals the shipwreck connection

label: Discovering Shipwreck Source
description: Runara informs characters that a wrecked ship off the rocks is the zombie origin

label: Fleeing Up Lower Path
description: Two residents flee upward along the lower path

label: Stained Robes Observed
description: Blood and dirt stains their clothing from the struggle

label: Abandoned Fishing Gear Found
description: Their fishing equipment is discovered discarded behind them

label: Pursuit By Sailor Corpses
description: Three bloated corpse-sailors begin chasing the fleeing residents

label: Using Zombie Encounter
description: The DM recommends using zombie encounters to introduce additional combat challenges during the adventure

label: Dialogue About Quest
description: Tarak instructs the characters to investigate the sea caves, uncover the plight of the myconids, retrieve heart cap mushrooms, and prepare for potential conflict with the fungal octopus.

label: Receiving Gifted Sacks
description: Tarak presents the adventurers with a foul-smelling sack of food scraps as a token of goodwill toward the myconids.

label: Receiving Potions
description: Tarak provides the adventurers with two vials of healing potion for their journey.

label: Journey To Sea Caves
description: The party travels to the sea caves to fulfill Tarak’s request and assess the situation with the myconids.

label: Observing Guardian Threat
description: The adventurers note the presence of the fungal octopus, a dangerous guardian constructed by the myconids.

label: Combat Against Fungal Octopus
description: The party engages in battle against the fungal octopus to secure entry into the myconid territory.

label: Witnessing Recent Wreck
description: Varnoth and Rix observe a ship abruptly veer off course and crash into the rocks

label: Suggesting Investigation
description: Varnoth and Rix advise the characters to investigate the cause of the crash to help the island

label: Consulting Runara
description: When questioned by the characters, Runara recommends examining the wreck of Compass Rose

label: Arriving_at_Temple
description: Characters arrive at the temple (area A5) summoned by Runara

label: Dialog_with_Runara
description: Runara reveals the history of dragon-linked sites and discusses Aidron's disappearance

label: Receiving_Moonstone_Key
description: Runara hands over the moonstone key to unlock the observatory

label: Learning_of_Aidrons_Argument
description: Adventurers learn Aidron rejected Runara's teachings and fled to the observatory

label: Proving_Trustworthiness
description: Characters demonstrate competence by overcoming zombies, myconids, and navigating the shipwreck

label: Dialogue With Runara
description: Runara explains her true nature as a bronze dragon, references the island's unresolved conflicts, and requests assistance

label: Sudden Transformation Observed
description: A flash of lightning causes Runara to transform from a human woman into an enormous bronze dragon, revealing her true form

label: Unsuccessful_Encounter_On_Island
description: An encounter on the island results in all characters becoming unconscious.

label: Awakening_In_Temple
description: The characters awaken in the temple, discovering they are tended to by kobolds.

label: Sidekick_Introduction
description: Additional characters join the party as sidekicks upon arriving at Dragon's Rest.

label: Exploration of Stormwreck Isle
description: Characters traverse the island, uncovering uncharted areas and risks beyond designated locations

label: Runara Refuses Information
description: Runara declines to give the moonstone key or information about the observatory until the characters complete other objectives on the island.

label: Conditional Combat Difficulty
description: The text notes that encountering the observatory prematurely results in overly challenging combat encounters, suggesting a potential future conflict.

label: Observatory Destroyed By Battle
description: Runara battled her blue dragon rival, reducing the observatory to rubble.

label: Aidron Arrives At Observatory
description: Aidron traveled from Dragon's Rest to investigate the observatory.

label: Conflict Between Aidron And Sparkrender
description: Aidron and Sparkrender engaged in a fierce fight upon their first meeting.

label: Sparkrender Attempts To Influence Aidron
description: Sparkrender tried to manipulate Aidron against Runara, but failed due to Aidron's prejudice.

label: Sparkrender Captures Aidron
description: Sparkrender subdued and imprisoned Aidron in the observatory ruins.

label: Exploration_Via_Rowboat
description: Adventurers take a rowboat from Dragon's Rest to the Clifftop Observatory, sailing around the eastern end of the island.

label: Exploration_Along_Coast
description: Adventurers walk around the coastline of the island, circumventing the eastern bay to reach the Clifftop Observatory.

label: Exploration_Overland
description: Adventurers traverse a rough path across the island's rocky terrain from Dragon's Rest to the head of the eastern bay, directly approaching the Clifftop Observatory.

label: Observation_of_Sparkrender
description: Characters observe Sparkrender flying by, causing unease due to potential detection

label: Lightning_Breath_Revelation
description: Character identifies crystalline protrusions/scarred vegetation as signs of lightning strikes or dragon breath via Nature check

label: Approach_to_Observatory
description: Characters move toward the observatory after Sparkrender's departure

label: Exploring Rocky Terrain
description: Adventurers climb over rocky ground on Stormwreck Isle

label: Discovering Crystalline Protrusions
description: Adventurers spot glassy crystal protrusions emerging from the earth

label: Observing Reddish Scarred Vegetation
description: Adventurers notice vegetation with reddish branching scars forming similar shapes to the crystals

label: Hearing Screech and Sighting Winged Creature
description: A screeching roar prompts adventurers to see a winged, glittering blue creature soaring overhead

label: Sparkrender Does Not Notice Characters
description: Sparkrender fails to notice the characters as he retreats to his lair

label: Climb Bluffs to Reach D1
description: Characters move along the bluffs toward area D1

label: Ascend Pillar to Access D2-D5
description: By securing the boat at a pillar, characters gain access to areas D2, D3, D4, or D5

label: Exploring Southeast Tip
description: Adventurers round the southeastern tip of the island and observe crumbling ruins atop basalt columns off the main island body.

label: Observing Winged Creature
description: Adventurers hear a screeching roar and notice a winged, glittering blue shape soaring through the air.

label: Encountering Celestial Being
description: The winged, glittering blue creature descends onto the column farthest from Stormwreck Isle and vanishes from view.

label: kobold_hostility_observation
description: Observers notice kobolds display hostility toward outsiders but often issue warnings instead of immediate attacks

label: charisama_check_dialogue_attempt
description: Characters attempt to negotiate with kobolds using Charisma checks (Deception/Intimidation/Persuasion skills)

label: dragon_argument_encounter
description: Sparkrender argues with the metallic-green dragon at the observatory tower

label: secret_plan_discovery
description: Characters learn of Sparkrender's plan to manifest full power tied to the sculpture in rotunda ruins

label: dragon_activity_observation
description: Kobolds report hearing violent activity from the metallic dragon in the observatory tower

label: Magical_Light_Sparks
description: Magical light sparks ignite in both statues' open mouths when the key is inserted

label: Bridge_Formation_Discovered
description: A shimmering bridge of iridescent magical energy emerges connecting the overlook to the observatory ruins

label: Exploring Path To Cliff Edge
description: Adventurers traverse a broken and overgrown path toward the edge of the cliff

label: Observing Marble Statues At Overlook
description: Adventurers notice two marble statues veined with gold, depicting dragons roaring silently

label: Initial_Kobold_Stirge_Battle
description: The two winged kobolds initiate a battle with eight stirges.

label: Stirges_Shift_Attention_To_Characters
description: Six of the stirges notice the characters and redirect their attacks toward them.

label: Kobolds_Handle_Remaining_Stirges
description: The kobolds eliminate the last two stirges before assessing the characters’ actions.

label: Character_Action_Affects_Kobold_Response
description: The kobolds react to whether characters aid, attack, or avoid them, altering their stance accordingly.

label: Kobolds_Approach_Characters_Post_Victory
description: Surviving kobolds approach the characters, revealing themselves as Mek and Minn.

label: Revelation_of_Mek_and_Minns_Backstory
description: Mek and Minn explain their abandonment of their wounded sister, Myla, and their allegiance to Sparkrender.

label: Conditional_Friendly_Dialogue_with_Kobolds
description: If characters aided the kobolds or hinted at Myla’s survival, the kobolds become allies and offer guidance.

label: Retrieval_of_Moonstone_Key_from_D1
description: Characters obtain the moonstone key from Area D1 to enable progress to D4.

label: Bridge_Activation_to_D4
description: Using the moonstone key, characters unlock access to the bridge connecting to Area D4.

label: Observing Plaza Structure
description: The plaza features broken stone lines, fragments of statues, pillars, and a central sculpture.

label: Hearing Screech
description: A loud screech erupts from across the plaza.

label: Encountering Batlike Creatures and Kobolds
description: A half-dozen batlike creatures swarm around two winged kobolds with blue-painted snouts.

label: Kobolds vs. Batlike Creatures Combat
description: The kobolds engage in fierce combat against the batlike creatures but struggle to prevail.

label: Observing_Golden_Sculpture
description: A character studies the sculpture and succeeds in an Intelligence (Arcana) check to decipher its significance.

label: Discovering_Comet_Trail
description: The adventurers learn that the comet's position predicts it will pass extremely close to Toril.

label: Planning_Ritual_For_Kingkiller_Star
description: Sparkrender intends to perform a ritual when the comet (King-Killer Star) reaches its closest point to Toril, believing it grants control over dragons.

label: Stirge_Attack_Interrupts_Task
description: A stirge attack disrupts the kobolds' preparations for Sparkrender's ritual.

label: Kobolds_Explain_Dragon_Effigies
description: If asked, Mek and Minn reveal the kobolds created the dragon effigies based on Sparkrender's instructions.

label: Encountering_Kobold_Group
description: The kobolds are hostile toward the characters and determined to scare off intruders.

label: Intimidation_Successful
description: A successful Charisma (Intimidation) check causes the kobolds to back down.

label: Discovering_Sling_Bullet
description: The characters observe the kobolds polishing the Sling Bullet.

label: Exploring_Bridge_Path
description: Characters traverse the rickety bridge linking the rotunda to the kobold camp.

label: Observing_Ritual_Preparations
description: Characters notice the kobolds actively preparing for Sparkrender's ritual.

label: Observing_Skittering_Noises
description: Adversaries detect skittering sounds and whispered voices emanating from within the ruined tower

label: Exploring_Ruins_Structure
description: Adversaries examine the deteriorated tower and note gaps sealed with wooden planks and frayed fabric

label: Observation_Sparkrender_Sleeping
description: Adventurers notice Sparkrender the blue dragon wyrmling sleeping against the northeast wall

label: Discovery_Caved_In_Wall_to_D6
description: Players discover a caved-in wall beneath the tower revealing access to the secret library (area D6)

label: Pulley_Lift_Construction_By_Kobolds
description: A rough pulley lift created by kobolds allows wingless members to ascend to the main floor

label: Observation_Light_Effects_On_Walls
description: Rays of light dance across the stained glass dome, creating iridescent color shifts on the crumbling walls

label: Observation_Star_Map_Floor
description: A gilded star map covers the dust-covered floor, formed by intricate lines and inlays

label: Observation_Scholar_Statues
description: Four tall alabaster statues depicting scholars face different cardinal directions

label: Observation_Blue_Dragon_Slumbering
description: A lithe blue dragon sleeps in the northeast corner, surrounded by scattered treasure

label: Observation_Lightning_Around_Dragon
description: Arcs of electricity flicker along the dragon's horns and snout

label: Exploring to Avoid Awakening Dragon
description: Characters move quietly around the area to avoid waking the Blue Dragon Wyrmling, requiring successful stealth checks.

label: Attempting to Turn Statues
description: Characters attempt to turn north and east statues without waking Sparkrender. Failed checks result in noisy activation that awakens the dragon.

label: Awakening_Sparkrender
description: Sparkrender awakens and becomes hostile toward the characters, growling and threatening them in Draconic.

label: Skill_Check_Attempt
description: Characters who know Draconic attempt to persuade Sparkrender via Deception, Intimidation, or Persuasion skills. A success halts the attack temporarily.

label: Failed_Intervention_Or_Mention_Of_Names
description: If no skill check succeeds or if Aidron/Runara is mentioned, Sparkrender attacks.

label: Breath_Weapon_Attack
description: Sparkrender uses its Breath Weapon on subsequent rounds, requiring cover from statues.

label: Dragon_Dialogue_Turns
description: Sparkrender delivers thematic dialogue each turn, expressing ambition and disdain for the characters.

label: Low_HP_Flight_Response
description: When reduced to ≤10 HP, Sparkrender vows vengeance and attempts to flee, disengaging mid-combat.

label: Character_Flee_Response
description: Sparkrender taunts retreating characters, mocking their inability to resist his power.

label: Post_Defeat_Noise_Discovery
description: After defeating Sparkrender, characters hear growling/yelling emanating from Area D6.

label: Discover_Clue_In_Isolated_Study
description: Characters find a clue exhorting "four scholars" to "point your eyes toward the Dragon's light"

label: Identify_Dragon_Constellation_On_Starmap
description: Character successfully identifies a dragon-shaped constellation in the southeast quadrant of the star map after investigating

label: Notice_Grooves_On_Statues
description: Character detects worn grooves indicating statues can pivot on their bases after performing a perception check

label: Detect_Alignment_With_Seasonal_Qualifier
description: Successful perception check while adjusting statues reveals slight settling when aligned with southeast quadrant

label: Activate_Hidden_Mechanism
description: All statues correctly oriented trigger a glowing section to descend forming a spiral staircase to the library

label: Seal_Library_Shut
description: Staircase ascends when any statue is displaced, lifting anyone on it back to the observatory level

label: GatheringTreasureAfterDefeat
description: Characters gather Sparkrender's hoard after he no longer defends it

label: sparkrender_traps_aidron
description: Sparkrender weakens Aidron, forces him into the library, and collapses a wall to seal the exit, trapping him

label: characters_clear_rubble
description: Characters attempt to remove rubble blocking the library entrance by climbing from area D5 or swimming to the base

label: discovery_of_secret_library_interior
description: Characters successfully clear rubble to reveal the library's interior

label: meeting_aidron
description: Characters greet Aidron, who explains his failed escape attempts and conflict with Sparkrender

label: aidrons_dialogue_with_characters
description: Aidron reveals his regrets about failing to defeat Sparkrender and fears of becoming a conduit for Sparkrender's powers

label: aidron_decides_to_confront_sparkrender
description: Aidron prepares to challenge Sparkrender directly despite knowing his weakness

label: Environmental_Observation
description: Adversaries detect stale air with the scent of old parchment, observe book-filled shelves, and note shattered glass cases scattering contents across the stone floor

label: Encounter_Bronze_Dragon
description: An agitated bronze dragon emerges from wreckage near an overturned desk, indicating recent impact

label: Exploring_Treasure_Room
description: Characters explore the library room, searching for concealed items

label: Discovering_Magical_Items
description: Successful Investigation check reveals the presence of a +1 battleaxe and a 2nd-level hold person spell scroll

label: Detecting_Item_Location
description: Casters use detect magic spell to locate hidden items without requiring an ability check

label: Receiving_Catalog_Info
description: Aidron provides directional guidance to the discovered magical items

label: Return_to_Observatory_During_Ritual
description: Characters arrive at the observatory to find Sparkrender's ritual underway

label: Drive_Sparkrender_Away_Encounter
description: Characters force Sparkrender off the island without killing him

label: Leave_Aidron_Imprisoned
description: Characters choose to leave Aidron imprisoned in area D6

label: Runara_Urges_Return
description: Runara instructs characters to return to the observatory

label: Discover_Replacement_Effigies
description: Characters find crude replacements for dragon effigies if previously destroyed

label: Confront_Sparkrender
description: Final showdown with Sparkrender, who fights to the death

label: Sparkrender_Unleash_BreathWeapon
description: Sparkrender releases lightning-based Breath Weapon attack as characters approach

label: Notice_Kobold_Presence
description: Characters detect lingering kobolds and winged kobolds near the site

label: Observing Colorful Light Display
description: Streams of colored light swirl around the golden statue, matching the colors of the dragon effigies

label: Lightning Bolt Emission
description: The blue dragon releases a bolt of lightning upward after displaying signs of pain/ecstasy

label: Agony of Bound Dragon
description: The bronze dragon is visibly struggling against three heavy chains tied to the ground

label: Random Magical Effect During Combat
description: At the end of each combat round (initiative count 0), a random magical effect occurs due to dragon spirits swirling in the rotunda.

label: Astalagan's Blessing
description: Aidron and the characters regain 1d4 + 4 hp as bronze light surrounds them.

label: Clyssavar's Flames
description: Sparkrender takes 7 (2d6) fire damage if failing a Dexterity save from golden light crashing into him.

label: Eldenemir's Gift
description: Sparkrender's breath weapon recharges as blue light enfolds him.

label: Sharruth's Fury
description: Characters take 3 (1d6) fire damage if failing a Dexterity save from red light erupting with fire.

label: Turadaer's Tricks
description: Aidron and the characters gain advantage on attack/saving throws until next round’s initiative 0 from brass light sparking around them.

label: Attempting to Remove Chains
description: Characters attempt to undo the clasps attaching Aidron's chains to the ground, requiring an action per clasp.

label: Aidron Regains Mobility
description: After all three clasps are removed, Aidron is no longer restrained, though his speed is reduced by 10 feet due to lingering chains.

label: Potential Use of Repulsion Breath
description: Aidron retains the capability to use his Repulsion Breath if strategically advantageous, despite being unable to target Sparkrender with his lightning Breath Weapon.

label: Manipulate_Effigies
description: Characters interact with effigies to invoke effects from the Dragon Spirits Table

label: Destroy_Effigies
description: Characters destroy effigies to permanently negate their effects

label: Disturb_Sculpture
description: Attempts to alter the golden sculpture cause temporary distractions to Sparkrender

label: Return to Dragon's Rest
description: The characters return to Dragon's Rest with Aidron, marking the end of their mission.

label: Meeting Runara
description: Runara greets the characters, expressing pleasure at Aidron’s return and offering rewards.

label: Reward Distribution
description: Runara grants each adventurer a potion of healing and an exquisite pearl valued at 100 gp.

label: Conditional Reaction to Sparkrender's Fate
description: Runara expresses grief if Sparkrender is dead, acknowledging the loss while refraining from blaming the characters.

label: Future Adventure Options Mentioned
description: Text hints at potential post-adventure scenarios involving Sparkrender's relatives or discoveries in the secret library.
